commands.review_summary:
The PR adds explicit fresh `model-run-<uuid>` session id/key routing to gateway `infer model run`, extends the CLI regression test, and adds a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main sends gateway model-run RPCs without explicit session routing, and the Gateway falls back omitted-session requests to the agent main session key. I did not run a live failing current-main gateway repro in this read-only review.
